notes: Primary SWG count is the number of registered roaming computers, per the requirement.
SWG username correlation used top-identities plus up to 3 targeted proxy activity lookups per device.
6 device(s) were not found in top-identities for the lookback window.
2 device(s) were found but did not reveal a user identity within the targeted lookup limit.
VPN count is based on unique users with connected events in the requested lookback window.
ZTNA count is the number of active device registrations returned by the Zero Trust User Devices API.
